2605.13538.title: Locale-Conditioned Few-Shot Prompting Mitigates Demonstration Regurgitation in On-Device PII Substitution with Small Language Models
2605.13538.paper_summary: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) redaction usually replaces detected entities with placeholder tokens such as [PERSON], destroying the downstream utility of the redacted text for retrieval and Named Entity Recognition (NER) training. We propose a fully on-device pipeline that substitutes PII with consistent, type-preserving fake values: a 1.5 B mixture-of-experts token classifier (openai/privacy-filter) detects spans, a 1-bit Bonsai-1.7B Small Language Model (SLM) proposes contextual surrogates for names, addresses, and dates, and a rule-based generator (faker) handles patterned fields. We report a prompting finding more important than the quantization choice: with naive fixed three-shot demonstrations, the 1-bit SLM regurgitates demonstration outputs verbatim regardless of input; 1.58-bit Ternary-Bonsai-1.7B reproduces byte-identical failures, ruling out quantization as the cause. We fix this with locale-conditioned rotating few-shot demonstrations: a character-range heuristic picks a locale-pure pool and a per-input MD5 hash samples three demonstrations. With the fix, 482/482 unique Bonsai-1.7B calls succeed (no echoes) and produce locale-correct surrogates, although the SLM still copies from a small same-locale demonstration pool - a residual narrowness we quantify. On a 2000-document multilingual corpus, hybrid perplexity (PPL) beats faker in all six locales under a multilingual evaluator (XGLM-564M); length preservation is best-of-three in 4 of 6 locales. On downstream NER (400 train / 100 test, English), redact yields F1=0.000, faker 0.656, original 0.960; on a matched 160/40 subset including hybrid, faker (0.506) outperforms hybrid (0.346) at p < 0.001. We report this as an honest negative finding: SLM surrogates produce more natural text but a less varied training distribution, and downstream NER benefits more from variety than from naturalness.
2605.13538.paper_summary_zh: 個人可識別資訊（PII）刪除通常用佔位符標記如 [PERSON] 來替換檢測到的實體，這破壞了刪除文本在檢索和命名實體識別（NER）訓練中的下游效用。我們提出了一個完全在設備上運行的管道，將 PII 替換為一致的、類型保留的虛假值：一個 1.5 B 的混合專家標記分類器（openai/privacy-filter）檢測範圍，一個 1 位的 Bonsai-1.7B 小型語言模型（SLM）為姓名、地址和日期提出上下文替代品，還有一個基於規則的生成器（faker）處理模式化字段。我們報告了一個比量化選擇更重要的提示發現：在簡單的固定三次示範中，1 位 SLM 無論輸入如何都逐字重複示範輸出；1.58 位的三元 Bonsai-1.7B 重現了字節相同的失敗，排除了量化作為原因。我們通過基於地區條件的旋轉少量示範來修正這一點：一個字符範圍啟發式選擇一個地區純淨池，並且每個輸入的 MD5 哈希樣本三個示範。修正後，482/482 個獨特的 Bonsai-1.7B 調用成功（無回聲）並產生地區正確的替代品，儘管 SLM 仍然從一個小的相同地區示範池中複製——這是一個我們量化的殘餘狹隘性。在一個 2000 文檔的多語言語料庫中，混合困惑度（PPL）在所有六個地區的多語言評估器（XGLM-564M）下超越了 faker；在 6 個地區中的 4 個，長度保持是三次最佳。在下游 NER（400 訓練 / 100 測試，英語）中，刪除的結果為 F1=0.000，faker 為 0.656，原始為 0.960；在包括混合的匹配 160/40 子集上，faker（0.506）在 p < 0.001 的情況下超越了混合（0.346）。我們將這報告為一個誠實的負面發現：SLM 替代品產生了更自然的文本，但訓練分佈的變化較小，而下游 NER 更受益於多樣性而非自然性。
2605.13538.author: Anuj Sadani et.al.
